summary_line: Jun은 요즘 ‘The Drama’ Review: Her Secret Is His Crisis (NYTimes Arts)를 읽으며 파트너 리드에 감성을 붙이고 있습니다.

entries.title: ‘The Drama’ Review: Her Secret Is His Crisis
entries.summary: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson play a couple upended when one confesses to coming close to committing a horrific crime.

entries.title: Kanye West Plays First American Concert Since 2021
entries.summary: After years of antisemitic behavior, the rapper formerly known as Kanye West performed his first full live show in the United States since 2021.

entries.title: Danish Shows to Watch While We’re Still at Peace
entries.summary: The protector of Greenland also makes very entertaining TV.

entries.title: Bush: Tiny Desk Concert
entries.summary: If you think you know "Machinehead" and "Glycerine," prepare to be surprised by these Tiny Desk arrangements of beloved alt-rock hits.

entries.title: Megan Moroney showcases her command of country heartache on 'Cloud 9'
entries.summary: Moroney's album arrives as a new kind of music from Big Pink: The Georgia-born singer/songwriter spins out tales of romantic revenge with a smooth fluency that's a stark contrasts ...

entries.title: Olivia Rodrigo Reveals New Album ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’
entries.summary: “I am so proud of this record and I can’t wait for you to hear it,” she says of her third album

entries.title: Ex-Turnstile Guitarist Brady Ebert Charged With Attempted Murder of Singer Brendan Yates’ Father
entries.summary: After Brady Ebert allegedly targeted the Turnstile frontman’s dad, the band says, “We have no language left for Brady”
